title: 小米：从哪里起飞，从哪里跌落
content: Xiaomi's stock soared from HK$12 to HK$60 following the unexpected success of its SU7 electric vehicle in 2024, driven partly by CEO Lei Jun becoming a social media phenomenon filling China's need for a business idol. However, the company saw its stock crash back to HK$28 by 2026 Q1 as car sales declined, smartphone shipments dropped 35%, and TV sales fell 22%. The article argues Xiaomi's core business fundamentals—thin margins in Android phones and volatile auto profits—never fundamentally changed. The author concludes that much of Xiaomi's rise and fall reflects market randomness and excessive public hype rather than genuine business transformation.

title: ChatGPT将迎史上最大改版，从单一聊天变身“超级应用”
content: OpenAI is launching its largest ChatGPT upgrade, transforming it into a "super app" integrating programming tools and AI agents. The revamp prioritizes Codex, its AI code generation product that has become a major revenue driver. OpenAI faces pressure to improve profitability ahead of a potential IPO, with Q1 adjusted operating margins at -122% despite $5.7 billion in revenue. Weekly active users have plateaued around 905 million. Competitors Anthropic and Google are also expanding AI agent capabilities for enterprise customers and deeper software integration.

title: AI投资下半段缩圈游戏正式开始
content: The AI investment landscape is entering a consolidation phase where only leading optical component firms will thrive. NVIDIA's NVL576 architecture for 2027 is advancing both CPO and NPO pathways, with NPO emerging as a viable high-volume alternative that doubles optical value per GPU from 2.25 to 4 engines by decoupling optics from substrate constraints. This creates an $8-12 billion incremental market. Despite recent volatility, analysts maintain conviction in leaders like Innolight and Eoptolink, seeing price drops as buying opportunities. They cite verified 200-250 million unit demand forecasts for 2027, undervaluation versus global AI peers at 10x forward earnings, and accelerating technical advantages in 800G through 2.4T products plus NPO integration roles.

title: Mac book air M5 32G+1TB 能跑本地大模型？
content: A MacBook Air M5 with 32GB RAM can run local LLMs up to about 22GB in size but cannot sustain intensive workloads due to thermal throttling under sustained load. Testing with Ollama and OLMx (faster) platforms showed models like Qwen3.5-4B, Gemma-4-26B, Qwen3.6-35B, GLM-4.7-Flash, and GPT-OSS-20B achieve 40-60 tokens/second generation speeds. For portable sustained AI workloads, MacBook Pro is recommended instead.

title: 产品观察 | 小米创始员工范典创业AI硬件，做了台“无摩擦”的睡眠床头灯
content: Former Xiaomi founding employee Fan Dian spent three years developing the Sleepal AI Lamp, a contactless sleep monitoring bedside lamp. The $449 device uses 60GHz millimeter-wave radar, thermal sensors, microphone arrays, and environmental sensors to track breathing, heart rate, body movement, and sleep stages with 0.1mm precision. Validated against 1024 nights of clinical PSG data, its accuracy exceeds Apple Watch and Oura Ring. The lamp provides personalized sleep improvement recommendations and features circadian rhythm lighting and smart alarms. Fan's startup Gewu Technology aims to expand from bedroom sleep monitoring to whole-home health AI for chronic disease prevention.

title: Chat已死，GPT史上最大改版，不只聊天
content: OpenAI is redesigning ChatGPT—its largest overhaul since 2022—shifting from a chat interface to an agent platform that executes tasks like booking hotels, coding, and data analysis. The move merges ChatGPT with Codex, OpenAI's coding agent, as leadership changes reflect this strategic pivot. Facing competition from Anthropic—whose valuation, revenue growth, and coding tool market share now exceed OpenAI's—the redesign aims to build a "super app" with multiple revenue streams ahead of a potential September IPO. ChatGPT's 10 billion monthly active users offer reach, but with only 5% paying, monetization pressure is intense.

title: 微软的 SkillOpt 真的很水吗？
content: Microsoft's SkillOpt addresses whether agents actually learn from repeated failures or merely receive temporary fixes. Building on TextGrad's framework of treating system components as text that can be iteratively improved through feedback, SkillOpt narrows its focus to agent skill documentation—a persistent operational manual rather than disposable prompts. Its key contribution is a validation loop: failed tasks generate reflection-based modification proposals, but only bounded, tested changes that improve performance on retained tasks are kept. Failed modifications are recorded to prevent repetition. This creates a disciplined mechanism for converting failure experience into reliable, non-regressive behavioral memory rather than accumulating untested rules.

title: 库克送Siri最后一程
content: Apple's WWDC 2026 will debut a major Siri overhaul, marking CEO Tim Cook's final conference. The redesigned "Campo" Siri transforms from a basic voice tool into an AI companion with a dedicated Dynamic Island interface, standalone app, and multi-command capabilities. The new version, powered by Google's Gemini model, includes Apple's first search engine, writing assistance, and third-party chatbot integration. iOS 27 also brings AI-enhanced camera features, photo editing tools, and CoreAI for developers. Despite Apple's massive valuation, the company faces challenges: Siri's history of underdelivery, developer incentive disputes, supply constraints, and the fundamental question of whether this AI push can justify its premium market position.

title: Seesaw被申请破产，曾单店估值过亿，如今欠债千万关店100+
content: Seesaw Coffee, a pioneering Chinese specialty coffee brand once valued at over 100 million yuan per store, has entered bankruptcy liquidation. Shanghai Xishe Coffee Co., the operator, was formally accepted for bankruptcy by a Shanghai court in March 2026 after failing to pay debts exceeding 14 million yuan. Founded in 2012, Seesaw helped define China's specialty coffee scene through premium spaces, barista training, and supply chain innovation. Despite rescue attempts including smaller store formats and creative fruit coffees, the brand closed over 100 of its 135 peak locations, leaving only 34 operating. Its collapse illustrates the tension between artisanal quality and scalable growth in China's evolving coffee market.

title: ChatGPT将迎来史上最大改版，“AI只用来聊天的时代结束了”
content: OpenAI is planning ChatGPT's largest redesign since 2022, integrating its rapid-growth coding tool Codex and third-party apps to transform the chatbot into an "super agent" capable of writing code, managing schedules, and controlling software. The move, driven by GPT-5.5 model improvements and competitive pressure from Anthropic's Claude Code, accelerates OpenAI's shift from consumer chat to enterprise productivity tools. The company merged its ChatGPT, Codex, and API teams and cut projects like Sora to focus on monetization ahead of its planned IPO, as coding AI becomes central to its path toward artificial general intelligence.

title: 用什么 AI 暴露了你的阶层？没那么简单
content: User income levels correlate with AI product choice due to differences in pricing and distribution models, not deliberate class signaling. A 2025 Epoch AI/Ipsos survey found Claude users skew heavily high-income (80% earn $100K+) because it requires paid subscriptions, self-registration, and technical initiative. Meta AI attracts lower-income users (37% earn $100K+, 32% below $50K) through free integration in Facebook/Instagram. ChatGPT, Gemini, and Copilot show more balanced distributions. The pattern reflects customer acquisition costs and platform accessibility rather than identity-based selection. This snapshot may shift as competition drives price convergence and feature expansion across markets.
